translation: In the case (2025) Xin 40 Xing Zhong No. 9, the court held that the defendant, Chen Moujia, in order to evade liability, after receiving the notice from the court that he was added as a person subject to enforcement, knowing that his property had an outstanding bank loan and that his assets were insufficient to satisfy the debt owed to the enforcement applicant, Yang Mouyi, still sold the property and required the buyer to pay the sale proceeds in cash to his son. His subjective intent to transfer and conceal assets to evade court enforcement was obvious, thereby rendering the effective ruling of the people's court unenforceable. This constituted a serious circumstance and established the crime of refusing to enforce a judgment or ruling, for which he should be punished according to law.
